headline: Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE:PWR) Screens Strongly for High Growth Momentum and Minervini Trend Template
summary: Quanta Services (PWR) passes Mark Minervini's Trend Template and High Growth Momentum screen, showing strong uptrend, accelerating EPS/revenue growth, and a perfect Technical Rating of 10.
